desc: Opens the Project Settings window — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for viewing and editing project information, units, location, starting view, shared parameters, and BUILD X settings.
summary: Opens the Project Settings window — a WebView2 + AI Chat split-panel for viewing and editing project information, units, location, starting view, shared parameters, and BUILD X settings.
usecase: User wants to review or edit project information (name, number, client, address). User wants to change unit system (metric/imperial). User wants to set the starting view. User wants to configure shared parameter file. User wants to check project health (errors, clashes, warnings).
notfor: Changing object styles, line weights, or visual standards (use Object Styles window). Editing MEP system routing preferences (use Routing Preferences window).
postcondition: A singleton modeless ProjectSettingsWindow is shown. If already open, it is brought to front.

successprompts: Project Settings window is now open.
